subject: ci:copilot-agent-pr
fact: Copilot agent PRs show action_required (0 jobs). A maintainer must push an empty commit to trigger CI review.

subject: git:squash-branch-cleanup
fact: Squash-merged branches do not appear in --merged output. Use 'gh pr list --state all --head <branch>' to verify before deleting.

subject: authoring:agent-required-sections
fact: Agent files must contain ## Inputs, ## Workflow (or ## Process), and an output section (## Output, ## Expected Output, ## Report, or ## Results). Validated by test suite.

subject: authoring:skill-conventions
fact: Skill directories require SKILL.md with 'name' and 'description' frontmatter. Values in 'allowed_skills' must exactly match the skill directory name.

subject: process:sprint-worktree
fact: Sprint branches use separate git worktrees. Check with 'git worktree list' before creating a new sprint branch.

subject: process:task-classification
fact: Classify tasks before starting: Routine (≤3 turns), Familiar (≤5 turns), Novel (estimate N). Log failure pattern after 5 turns with no progress.

subject: memory:scope-policy
fact: Before store_memory, validate: repo-scoped (not project-specific), generic (useful to any BaseCoat team), durable (true in 3+ sprints), actionable (changes agent behavior). All four must be yes.

subject: ci:markdown-lint-md031
fact: Fenced code blocks need blank lines before and after (MD031) and a language specifier (MD040). Commonly breaks after rebases on governance.instructions.md.
citations: IBuySpy-Shared/basecoat — recurring lint failures across sprints 17-20
